scripts.dev: echo 'Open this directory in VSCode and then run your extension with F5 or `Run and Debug > Run Extension`!'
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run vsce-package

name: vscode-create-bun
description: Easily create new Bun projects from your editor. This extension adds a 'Create Bun Project' command that walks through 'bun init' CLI process without needing to use a terminal.

viewsWelcome.contents:
You can also create a new Bun project.

[Create Bun Project](command:vscode-create-bun.createBunProject)
